title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Plum - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Plum - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Plum! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Plum:
Plum is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Plum!
